---
title: Example exercise
session_id: session-01
format:
  html: default
  ipynb: default
---

## Task

Inspect the repository metadata and answer the questions below.

::: {.content-visible when-profile="assign"}
1. Which file is the source of truth for structural course metadata?
2. Which files are generated and should not be edited manually?
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="solution"}
1. `course.yml` is the source of truth for structural course metadata.
2. `data/sessions.generated.yml` is generated by `make sync-events` or the validator helper workflow.
:::
